## Summary

<!-- Describe the user-visible change and the main code paths touched. -->

## Verification

<!-- List the exact commands run, or explain why a check was skipped. -->

- [ ] `pnpm docs:check`
- [ ] Relevant package tests, lint, or build command:
- [ ] `pnpm --filter @opencairn/web i18n:parity` if web copy changed

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused to one logical topic.
- [ ] I updated `.env.example` for new environment variables.
- [ ] I updated public docs for user-facing behavior or architecture changes.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, private documents, local logs, or generated caches.
- [ ] For non-trivial contributions, I accepted the CLA via commit trailer or PR comment.
